description_long: This rifle features a robust, tactical design with a matte black receiver and a dark green fixed stock. The handguard is equipped with a vertical foregrip for enhanced control, and the barrel is relatively short, suggesting a compact, urban-oriented weapon. A prominent drum magazine is mounted beneath the receiver, indicating high ammunition capacity. The top of the receiver has a rail system, though no optical sights are attached, and standard iron sights are present. The muzzle is fitted with a flash hider, and the overall build appears to be constructed from metal and polymer materials, providing both durability and reduced weight.
description: A compact, tactical rifle with a green fixed stock, black receiver, vertical foregrip, and a drum magazine, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the green fixed stock, black receiver, vertical foregrip, and large drum magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the short barrel, flash hider, and the circular face of the drum magazine.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clearer visibility of the trigger and magazine release.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the green stock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
